sections.paragraph:
Original: בּקר

Transliteration: bâqâr

Phonetic: baw-kawr'

BDB Definition:

  1. cattle, herd, oxen, ox
    1. cattle (generic plural but singular in form - collective)
    2. herd (particular one)
    3. head of cattle (individually)

Origin: from H1239

TWOT entry: 274a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
